{
  "claims": [
    "California merchants paid $1.7 billion in swipe fees on sales tax alone in 2023.",
    "The average profit margin for US retailers is 3 to 9 percent, while for grocers it is only 1.6%.",
    "Profit margins for Visa and MasterCard are near 50%.",
    "Visa and MasterCard account for over 80% of payment processing in the US market.",
    "In 2021, retailers paid a total of $137.8 billion in credit and debit card processing fees, which was a 25% increase from the previous year.",
